metadata.description: A collection of tools I like

plugins.name: shipit
plugins.description: SHIPIT - A meta-prompting, context engineering and spec-driven development system for Claude Code

plugins.name: spek
plugins.description: Spec-driven development with triangle validation (SPEC ↔ tests ↔ code) and proven SHIPIT orchestration

plugins.name: statusline
plugins.description: Enhanced statusline showing model, directory, context usage, and API rate limits

plugins.name: vision-quest
plugins.description: Goal-driven development: pick goal, execute with TDD, reconcile learnings, repeat

plugins.name: trak
plugins.description: Agent-driven ticketing: propose tickets, refine into goals, execute with TDD, discover new work

plugins.name: oc-bridge
plugins.description: Bridge Claude Code skills, commands, agents, and plugins into OpenCode with wrappers and symlinks

plugins.name: crew
plugins.description: Reusable agents for code review, codebase mapping, and integration checking

plugins.name: phoenix
plugins.description: Distill failed attempts into ASHES.md learnings and reset to a clean baseline
